narrative:
Westerville 3-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 767 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
